title: Condition with a non-Condition-domain SNOMED code routes to observation (not condition_occurrence)
notes: Domain-routing case. The input is a FHIR Condition, but its only coding is SNOMED 314529007 'Medication review due (situation)'. In the OMOP vocabulary this SNOMED code is itself the standard concept 4199788 'Medication review due' whose domain_id is 'Observation' (verified in vocab.concept: standard_concept='S', domain_id='Observation', vocabulary_id='SNOMED', concept_code='314529007'). Because 314529007 is already standard it 'Maps to' itself, so src_concept_id = std_concept_id = 4199788. The shared resolve pass (mapspec/etl/_resolve_condition.sql) walks the coding system through cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab (http://snomed.info/sct -> SNOMED), looks up the source concept, follows 'Maps to' to the standard concept, and records std_domain='Observation'. The four per-domain stage-2 ETLs then filter on std_domain: Condition__observation.sql picks up the row (WHERE std_domain='Observation') and Condition__condition_occurrence.sql does NOT, so this Condition produces ZERO condition_occurrence rows and exactly ONE observation row. Verified directly: cdm_ours_fhir.condition_occurrence has 0 rows for this resource/person; cdm_ours_fhir.observation has the single expected row. Column derivation (from Condition__observation.sql): observation_concept_id = std_concept_id 4199788; observation_date/datetime = COALESCE(onset.ofType(dateTime), onset.ofType(Period).start, recordedDate) = onsetDateTime 2020-06-16T12:01:40+01:00 -> date 2020-06-16, timestamp 2020-06-16 12:01:40; observation_type_concept_id = constant 32827 'EHR encounter record' (Type Concept, verified); observation_source_value = left(COALESCE(code.coding.display, code, code.text),50) = 'Medication review due (situation)'; observation_source_concept_id = src_concept_id = 4199788; provider_id = COALESCE(asserter, recorder) -> NULL (neither present on the resource); visit_occurrence_id = referenceToId(encounter) = enc-1. The verificationStatus is 'confirmed', which passes the stage-2 filter (NOT IN refuted/entered-in-error); clinicalStatus 'resolved' and abatementDateTime are read by the view but do not affect the observation mapping. All value/qualifier/unit columns are NULL by construction for a domain-routed Condition (it carries no Observation.value).
